'''竏嗷-ng-k-p''' ('''karangkepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinella|quinella]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinella|quinella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-ng-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| karangkepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirangkepoko || jirangkepoko || shirangkepoko || kirangkepoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurangkepoko || jujurangkepoko || shushurangkepoko || kukurangkepoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurangkepoko || jurangkepoko || shurangkepoko || kurangkepoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurangkepoko || jurangkepoko || shurangkepoko || kurangkepoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therangkepoko || jerangkepoko || sherangkepoko || kerangkepoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorangkepoko || jojorangkepoko || shoshorangkepoko || kokorangkepoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorangkepoko || jorangkepoko || shorangkepoko || korangkepoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorangkepoko || jorangkepoko || shorangkepoko || korangkepoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko || rangkepoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦrangkepoko || jﾃｦrangkepoko || shﾃｦrangkepoko || kﾃｦrangkepoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharangkepoko || jajarangkepoko || shasharangkepoko || kakarangkepoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharangkepoko || jarangkepoko || sharangkepoko || karangkepoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharangkepoko || jarangkepoko || sharangkepoko || karangkepoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sharangkepithi || sharangkepiji || sharangkepishi || sharangkepiki
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sharangkepothof || sharangkepojof || sharangkeposhof || sharangkepokof
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sharangkepﾃｦthﾃｦ || sharangkepﾃｦjﾃｦ || sharangkepﾃｦshﾃｦ || sharangkepﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || sharangkepatha || sharangkepaja || sharangkepasha || sharangkepaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || sharangkepatha || sharangkepaja || sharangkepasha || sharangkepaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || sharangkepathaf || sharangkepajaf || sharangkepashaf || sharangkepakaf
|}
